overview.short: Bhaskargad Fort, alternatively known as Basgad Fort, is a hill fort situated within the Nashik district of Maharashtra, India.
overview.description: Bhaskargad Fort, alternatively known as Basgad Fort, is a hill fort situated within the Nashik district of Maharashtra, India. Part of the Trimbak hill range, it lies in proximity to Harihar Fort.

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Dugarwadi waterfall
topPlaces.description: Dugarwadi waterfall is 30 kilometres (19 mi) from Nashik and around 177 kilometers (110 mi) from Mumbai on Trimbakeshwar road and 2 kilometres (1.2 mi) from the Jawhaar road. In monsoon season, people are advised to take care as the water level suddenly rises.

topPlaces.name: Trymbakgad
topPlaces.description: Trymbakgad Fort/Brahmagiri Fort (Marathi: त्र्यंबकगड किल्ला) is a fort located 30 km from Nashik, in Nashik district, of Maharashtra, India. This is an important fort in Nashik district.

items.note: Dugarwadi waterfall is 30 kilometres (19 mi) from Nashik and around 177 kilometers (110 mi) from Mumbai on Trimbakeshwar road and 2 kilometres (1.2 mi) from the Jawhaar road. In monsoon season, people are advised to take care as the water level suddenly rises.
Trymbakgad Fort/Brahmagiri Fort (Marathi: त्र्यंबकगड किल्ला) is a fort located 30 km from Nashik, in Nashik district, of Maharashtra, India. This is an important fort in Nashik district.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Bhaskargad?
faq.a: The best time to visit Bhaskargad is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

The nearest airport is Shirdi Airport (102 km) and the nearest railway station is Nashik Road (43 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Bhaskargad?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Bhaskargad at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Bhaskargad?
faq.a: Stays in Bhaskargad start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Bhaskargad?
faq.a: The top attractions are Dugarwadi waterfall, Trymbakgad.
